_source: Real SonarCloud output captured from Quantum-L9/PR_Repair PR #15 (get_comments). EVIDENCE that on this repo SonarCloud publishes on the ISSUE-COMMENT channel (a Quality-Gate summary), NOT as inline review threads: get_review_comments for PR #15 returned zero threads. The summary carries no per-issue path/line/rule, so it is not per-finding actionable. The SonarAdapter reads review threads (get_review_threads), so it correctly yields no findings here. Sonar actuation requires SonarCloud PR inline decoration (per-issue review comments); until a repo confirms that shape, sonarcloud stays disabled.

sample.body_excerpt: Quality Gate failed — Failed conditions: C Security Rating on New Code (required >= A)
